refined_caption: A rodent is visible in a hospital room, near a sink. The rodent appears to be in close proximity to a patient care area.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat in my hospital room, right next to the sink where patients wash their hands. This is completely unacceptable and I'm worried about the health and safety of patients. The hospital needs to take immediate action to address this pest control issue.
voice_text: There's a rat in my hospital room, right next to the sink, this is disgusting and I'm really concerned about patient safety.
